title: Create reusable rcql code-quality workflow skill

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Creating a global Codex skill for rcql workflows with opinionated defaults: quiet mode, report-only behavior, language targeting, remediation loop, and verification scans.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Completed global skill creation: ~/.codex/skills/rcql-analysis. Skill enforces rcql quiet mode (-q -v), language targeting, report-only semantics, remediation loop, and fresh non-report-only verification scans. Validated with quick_validate.py.
